summary: Tested Chispa MVP (Spanish creativity trainer). Backend: 10/11 pytest tests passed (1 transient upstream LLM 'Budget has been exceeded' 500 — not a code bug, same endpoint passed at level 4). Frontend: full E2E flow works on mobile viewport (375x667/390x844): onboarding → home → daily challenge with AI feedback (+15 XP, streak +1 persisted) → idea trainer (Socratic reply in Spanish) → connector (2 concepts + 3 bisociations + invitation) → profile (level path, reset, notifications). All AI responses in Spanish (castellano).

minor.issue: When upstream LLM gateway returns transient errors (e.g. 'Budget has been exceeded', rate-limit), backend returns generic HTTP 500. Should catch ChatError and return 503 with a friendly Spanish message (e.g. 'La IA está saturada, intenta en unos segundos'). Frontend Alert text 'Revisa tu conexión' is misleading when actual cause is upstream quota.
Level 4 prompt instructs hint=null but the schema still allows a string; one run returned null correctly, but worth ensuring stricter post-validation if level>=3 -> force hint=None.

issues: Console warning: useNativeDriver not supported on web — expected for Expo web preview, harmless but spammy.
Console warning from expo-notifications: 'Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web' — gracefully no-ops, fine.

expo doctor warns versions out of sync: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0), expo-notifications@55.0.22 (expected ~0.32.17), react-native-svg@15.15.4 (expected 15.12.1). May affect native builds; web preview unaffected. Recommend aligning to Expo SDK 54 expected versions before production build.

action_items: (LOW) Wrap claude_call in try/except in server.py: catch emergentintegrations.llm.chat.ChatError and re-raise as HTTPException(503, 'La IA está saturada un momento, intenta de nuevo') so transient LLM gateway failures surface a clearer error to the mobile UI.
(LOW) Align Expo SDK 54 package versions per `npx expo doctor` before any native build: async-storage 2.2.0, expo-notifications ~0.32.17, react-native-svg 15.12.1.
(OPTIONAL) Force hint=None server-side when level>=3 in DailyChallengeOut to enforce spec deterministically (not just via prompt).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean (~340 lines), well-structured, async/await correct, no _id leaks (stateless backend, no DB usage at all).
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY accessed via os.environ['...'] — fails fast if missing. Good.

All interactive elements have testID (verified: onboarding-start/next/finish/purpose-*, home-daily-challenge-card, home-trainer-card, home-connector-card, challenge-input/submit/feedback, trainer-input/send, connector-fuse, etc).
CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — works for this stateless app but is technically invalid per CORS spec; no impact since no cookies are used.
extract_json regex is non-greedy on fenced blocks but greedy on bare braces — fine for the controlled prompts but could fail on adversarial nested JSON. Acceptable.

success_rate.backend: 91% (10/11 — 1 transient upstream LLM budget error, retry passes)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (onboarding, home, challenge, trainer, connector, profile all functional, Spanish, AI integrated)

seed_data_creation: None — app is stateless server-side, all progress in AsyncStorage on device.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_chispa_api.py; rerun with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Each AI endpoint test takes 3-8s. Frontend public URL: https://chispa-trainer.preview.emergentagent.com (root auto-redirects to /onboarding for fresh users, /home if onboarded). Use mobile viewport. Key testIDs: onboarding-start/next/finish, onboarding-purpose-{trabajo|arte|problemas|diversion}, home-screen, home-daily-challenge-card, home-trainer-card, home-connector-card, home-open-profile, challenge-title/prompt/input/submit/feedback/back-home/hint-toggle, trainer-input/send, connector-fuse, back-button. AsyncStorage persists per-browser-context, so each new Playwright context starts fresh from /onboarding.
rca_of_issue: Single failing test (TestDailyChallenge::test_daily_challenge_level1_diversion) RCA: backend log showed 'litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.003312, Max budget: 0.001'. This is an upstream LLM gateway transient quota glitch that emergentintegrations re-raised as ChatError, which the endpoint surfaces as HTTP 500. The same endpoint (level 4) succeeded immediately after, so the code path is correct; only mitigation is graceful 503 mapping. NOT a Chispa code bug.
